name: Giovanni's Shrimp Truck
tagline: The OG garlic shrimp truck since 1993 — scrawl your name on the side and join the legend.
mustOrder: scampi (garlic butter) — the dish that made them famous
talkStory: Started in 1993 by Giovanni and Donna Aragon — a white van on the roadside in Kahuku that single-handedly launched the entire North Shore shrimp truck industry. The scampi (garlic butter shrimp) recipe hasn't changed in 30 years and the graffiti-covered truck is now an Oahu landmark. Expect 30-45 minute waits during peak hours — arrive by 10:30am opening to beat the tour bus crowds. Barack Obama stopped here during a presidential visit. Don't wear a nice shirt — garlic butter splatters are inevitable. Combine with Romy's one mile up the road for the ultimate shrimp showdown.
